name: Dataset Generator
description_en: Generate, normalize, verify, deduplicate, and export training datasets from topics, URLs, reference material, or existing JSONL/CSV—supporting SFT and DPO workflows.
description_zh: 从主题、URL、参考材料或现有 JSONL/CSV 生成、规范化、校验、去重并导出训练数据集——支持 SFT 与 DPO 工作流。
long_en: Uses deterministic local pipeline scripts with custom export schemas to build datasets for Codex, Antigravity, and Claude Code.
long_zh: 借助确定性的本地流水线脚本与自定义导出 schema,为 Codex、Antigravity 与 Claude Code 构建数据集。
sec_note_en: Can fetch reference material from URLs and writes dataset files locally; review sources and outputs.
sec_note_zh: 可从 URL 获取参考材料并在本地写出数据集文件;请审阅来源与产物。
